---
title: "TreeFuser: A Framework for Analyzing and Fusing General Recursive Tree Traversals"
date: 2017-10-24
year: 2017
pdf: "https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3133900"
venue: "OOPSLA 2017"
code: "https://github.com/laithsakka/Grafter"
slides: ""
preprint: ""
video: "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WDHlP6g5rxo&ab_channel=SplashConference2017"
author:
  - name: Laith Sakka
  - name: Kirshanthan Sundararajah
  - name: Milind Kulkarni
categories:
  - Conference
description: ""
---
